name: Quick Check Cashing and Boost
description_short: Detroit-based check cashing service also offering mobile phone services, phone repair, and prepaid mobile options through Boost and Verizon.
description_long:
Quick Check Cashing and Boost operates as a multi-service financial and mobile services provider located in Detroit, Michigan at 21400 McNichols Rd W. The business originated as a check cashing operation serving the local Detroit community and has expanded to include complementary services that address both financial and telecommunications needs of its customer base.

The company offers core check cashing services alongside money transfer capabilities and bill payment options. Additionally, Quick Check Cashing and Boost operates as an authorized Boost Mobile and Verizon retailer, providing prepaid mobile phone plans and devices. Phone repair services round out their service offerings, allowing customers to address device issues while conducting other transactions at the same location.

The primary distinction of this business model is its convergence of financial services with mobile telecommunications solutions. Rather than operating as a standalone check cashing venue, the company leverages the high foot traffic from mobile phone services to cross-sell financial services, or vice versa. This bundled approach is uncommon in the check cashing industry and creates operational efficiency by serving multiple consumer needs in a single location.

Quick Check Cashing and Boost serves a practical but limited market. The company depends heavily on customers who need both check cashing and mobile services or phone repairs, which may limit repeat business from those seeking only one service. Operating hours are standard for retail (9 AM–7 PM most days, 9 AM–3 PM Saturday), and the business is closed Sundays, which may inconvenience customers needing weekend access. No information is available regarding fee structures, exchange rates, or competitive positioning relative to other check cashers in Detroit.
pros: Convenient location on McNichols Rd W with accessible storefront and nearby parking options
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Mon-Wed, Thu-Fri) accommodate working customers
Authorized Boost Mobile and Verizon retailer offering prepaid plans and devices on-site
Phone repair services eliminate need to visit separate repair vendor
Multi-service convenience allows customers to handle check cashing, phone services, and repairs in one trip
Local community focus suggests familiarity with neighborhood customer base and needs
Contactable by phone at (313) 766-7756 for questions before visiting
cons: Limited hours on Saturday (9 AM–3 PM) and completely closed Sunday reduces accessibility for weekend customers
Website provides no fee schedule, making cost comparison with competitors impossible before visiting
No information disclosed about check cashing limits, accepted check types, or verification requirements
Hybrid business model (financial + mobile + repairs) may result in longer wait times if all services are equally busy
Primary website link (boostmobile.com) routes to Boost Mobile corporate site rather than company-specific information
best_for: Detroit residents who need check cashing and also require prepaid mobile phone services or phone repairs
Unbanked or underbanked customers seeking convenient financial services in the McNichols Road area
Boost Mobile or Verizon customers needing local prepaid plan activation or device purchase
Customers with broken phones seeking same-location phone repair and financial services
diagnosis: Quick Check Cashing and Boost is best for Detroit-area residents who simultaneously need check cashing services and mobile phone solutions, creating operational convenience through co-location. The main caveat is that no fee information is publicly available, and the company's hybrid service model may create bottlenecks during peak hours, making advance phone contact advisable before visiting.
